creator: rs@bytecamp.net
text: When installing www/apache24 (2.4.9-r3) from ports, no config files get installed. I've checked on FreeBSD-8.4-p12 and FreeBSD-10.0-p2. The files httpd.conf, magic, mime.types, extra/* are even missing from the stage dir but are installed below /usr/local/share/examples/apache24.
